meaning: n.[空]烧蚀挡板(太空船外部的防热物质),烧灼体,烧灼材料
examples: We deduce the formula of the critical thickness of ablator, and put forward the rule of how the thickness of ablator affect the velocities and the stability of flyer.
The flyer design emphasizes conceptually and physically separate functions of light collection at a distance from the laser source, light concentration on the ablator, and autonomous steering.
Who is supposed to worry about our ignorance of what the true equation of state is of the ablator that is supposed to push the fuel inwards so that it compresses while staying cold?
